user_query: Give me a full picture of our commercial activity in Brussels.

plan.query: Give me a full picture of our commercial activity in Brussels.
plan.reasoning: The query asks for a comprehensive overview of commercial activities, which implies using all available agents to gather relevant data on accounts, contacts, opportunities, and locations in that area.

steps.task: Fetch all accounts, contacts, opportunities, and cases related to our commercial activity in Brussels.
Gather information on locations related to our commercial activity in Brussels, including store sites or physical presence.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results from both Salesforce and Smartsales to create a comprehensive overview of commercial activity in Brussels.

invoked_agents.input: Fetch all accounts, contacts, opportunities, and cases related to our commercial activity in Brussels.
Gather information on locations related to our commercial activity in Brussels, including store sites or physical presence.
